Clinical: Indicates clinical relevance or status of the sample.
Mutation: Denotes presence or absence of mutation in the sample.
CNV: Indicates copy number variation status in the sample.
miRNA-seq: Reflects miRNA sequencing result for the sample.
mRNA-seq: Reflects mRNA sequencing result for the sample.
TMT Proteome: Reflects TMT (Tandem Mass Tag) proteomics analysis result.
TMT Proteome (Normal): Reflects normal TMT proteomics analysis result.
TMT Phosphoproteome (Normal): Indicator for normal phosphoproteome level, always 1.0 in samples.
Subsite: Specific subsite of the colon affected.
Vascular_Invasion: Indicator if tumor has invaded blood vessels.
Lymphatic_Invasion: Indicates if lymphatic invasion is present (Yes) or absent (No).
Perineural_Invasion: Indicates if perineural invasion is present (Yes) or absent (No).
Synchronous_Tumors: Indicates if synchronous tumors are present (Yes) or absent (No).
Polyps_History: Indicates if there is a history of polyps (Yes) or not (No).
Polyps_Present: Indicates if polyps are currently present (Yes) or not (No).
Vital.Status: Indicates the current vital status of the patient (Living or Deceased).
Tumor.Status: Indicates if the patient is tumor free or has a tumor.
POLE_mutation: Mutation status of POLE gene, indicated by a numerical value (0.0 suggests absence).
MSH2_mutation: Mutation status of MSH2 gene, indicated by a numerical value (0.0 suggests absence).
MSH6_mutation: Mutation status of MSH6 gene, indicated by a numerical value (0.0 suggests absence).
PMS2_mutation: Binary indicator for PMS2 gene mutation status.
KRAS_mutation: Binary indicator for KRAS gene mutation status.
NRAS_mutation: Binary indicator for NRAS gene mutation status.
BRAF_mutation: Binary indicator for BRAF gene mutation status.
mutation_rate: Rate of mutations per base pair in the sample.
Hypermutation_status: Status indicating if sample is hypermutated or not.
CMS: Consensus Molecular Subtype (CMS) classification of the sample.
StromalScore: Score indicating stromal activity level in the sample.
ImmuneScore: Score indicating immune cell infiltration level in the sample.
ESTIMATEScore: Score estimating epithelial and stromal cell composition in the sample.
TumorPurity: Estimated purity level of the tumor sample.
UMS: Unified Medical System code, likely categorizing medical conditions or procedures, consistently 'CIN' in samples, suggesting a specific condition or category.
